raw_consumer_statement: Hello, I am disputing a charge of XXXX from XXXX in which I told them that I had devices stolen and the charge was not me and later cancelled in less than XXXX hours. I then reached out to the bank and they later denied my claim without showing any documents only verbal. I also have not had a chance to show documentation with Barclays. I also requested that the bank stop all payments from XXXX which they refused. I am asking to reopen the case but am unsure if they are going to do so.
